title: Supporting the designation of January 31, 2025, as "Earned Income Tax Credit Awareness Day".
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Ways and Means.
crs_summary: This resolution expresses support for the designation of Earned Income Tax Credit Awareness Day. The resolution also calls for increasing awareness of (1) the earned income tax credit, which is refundable; (2) other refundable federal tax credits; and (3) free tax filing assistance.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Ways and Means.
